title: Katters Structures
description: Adds 30+ brand new vanilla like structures to the game
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76479a37bd2849a6b4dc998bcfa897c33edb6104.png)
# 📖 Description Adds 30+ brand-new vanilla-like structures to the game There are dedicated versions for only the [Villages](https://modrinth.com/datapack/katters-structures-only-village), [Dungeon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/katters-structures-only-dungeon) and [Ambient](https://modrinth.com/datapack/katters-structures-only-ambient) Structures as well as the [Deep Blue Dimension](https://modrinth.com/datapack/katters-structures-deep-blue). There is also an official [Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/katters-structures-resource-pack) # 🛠️ Compatibility Has support for: - [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) - [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) - [Automaticons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/automaticons)
versions - v1.1 - v1.3 : have dedicated versions
- v1.4 - v1.6 : for Automaticon version v1.2.1, Automaticons can be looted in some structures without the need of no extra version
- v1.7 : temporary disabled until the datapack gets updated
- v1.8+ : Automaticons can be looted in some structures without the need of no extra version for both the pre 20.5 and 20.5+ version The Version of Automaticons for pre 20.5 can be found on our Discord: [Explorer's Eden](https://discord.com/invite/f2pMggfgVv)
- [Nice Mobs Remastered](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nice-mobs-remastered) - dedicated spawnpoints for some mobs - [Nice Blockhead Mobs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nice-blockhead-mobs) - successor to NMR - [Enchantments Encore](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantments-encore) - compatible Enchantments - [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions) - shows Enchantment Descriptions - [Enchantment Lore](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-lore) - Open enchanted books like written books to read their description and lore. # 🍦 Vanilla Friendly! Uses only vanilla blocks. No other dependencies are needed. # 📚 Content
Structures - Cherry Village - Jungle Village - Swamp Village - Ocean Village - Underground Village - Sky Village - Ruined village - Mountain villager statue - Ocean villager statue - Desert villager statue - Witch circle - Shroom cave - Big Birch Tree - Big Dark Oak Tree - Big Cherry Tree- Windmill - Graveyard - Desert Dungeon - better Vanilla Dungeon - Sky Dungeon - Armory - 4 Mini-Dungeons - Skyrtle - Mesa Village - Birch Village - Spider Den - Deep Blue Labs - Deep Blue Lab Ruins - Trader Outposts - Magic Tower - Deep Blue City - Skyhold - Ocean Ships - Sky Decor - Pillager Village - Fossils - Far Watch
Bosses - Raj Raksha - Tenkū Mizu Gami - Arachne - Magus Theron - Rústa
Enchantments - Blunt - increases Damage against Armor - Heavy - increases Damage but lowers Attackspeed and Agility - Light - increases Agility but lowers Defense - Curse of Crystal - Greatly increases Damage at the cost of robustness of the Weapon - Curse of Alchemy - Grants random Effects - Ocean Heart - Grants Conduit Power, in Water - Web walker - Allows to faster walk in Cobwebs and gives Weaving Aspect - Enlightning - Summons Lightning on Lightningrods
added 50+ new Books with interesting Stories from the perspective of Villagers, Theron and Nox 4 new spells dropped by Magus Theron Multiple random Totems a Block that lets you use Raj Lightning Rod to randomly spawn Lightning in an Area a brand-new Dimension: The Deep Blue # 💬 Dialog/ Gamerules From KS version 2.3 and MC version 1.21.6 Katters Structures has the new Dialog function. These allow you: - as Admin/ OP: - To give yourself any special Item in the Pack - Change the Gamerules of KS: - This Includes Disabling all Bosses, - Disabling entrance to the Deep Blue, - Disabling the use of Custom Models, - Disabling Bossbars - as a normal User: - look up a Pack FAQ as Admin: ```/function kattersstructures``` as User: it's found in the pause menu ❗ Disabling Bosses or the Deep Blue will not disable the structures/ dimension itself. It will only disable the spawning of them or the functionality of already spawned ones. Sadly, it's not possible to disable Structures via Code in Datapacks # 🛠️ How to, Instructions The datapack usually just needs to be installed. There is nothing else you have to do. It just works out of the box. For **PaperMC users**, it is recommended to set the `paper.maxChatCommandInputSize` property to a value between 512 and 1024. More information can be found in the [PaperMC Docs](https://docs.papermc.io/paper/reference/system-properties/#papermaxchatcommandinputsize). Also make sure to have `allow-non-player-entities-on-scoreboards` enabled in your paper configs. **The data pack version also doubles as a resource pack. So in order to be able to see them, just place the data pack .zip also in your resource folder and activate it like any other resource pack.** Or download the official [Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/katters-structures-resource-pack). # ✍️ Feedback, Questions & Suggestions We're here to help! If you happen to have questions, suggestions or just encountered a bug, then feel free to hop on our Discord server to ask for help in our **Data Pack Section**. [Click to join the server](https://discord.gg/f2pMggfgVv) ## 🎮 Explorer's Eden SMP Join **[A Realm Recrafted](https://modrinth.com/server/a-realm-recrafted)**, our Minecraft SMP! Enjoy a world featuring all of our (actively maintained) data packs, as well as some exclusive ones. It’s completely free without any microtransactions. Come build, explore, and craft with us today!
